abilities.description: Skilled: Your friend has a helpful set of skills. When you make a move outside of combat aided by your companion's expertise, you may reroll your action die if its value is less than your companion's health.

Shield-Kin: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a903d120af3b1475]{Battle}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Siege} alongside your companion by standing strong together, add +1.

Bonded: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff17e67a59539df4]{Face Desolation} in the presence of your friend, take your friend's health as +momentum before you roll. On a string hit with a match, mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track.
